remember: Students will be able to recall the central theme, setting and characters of the poem 'The Voice of the Rain'.
Students will be able to list the devices used by the poet to convey the theme of the poem.
Students will be able to explain the role of the rain in the poem.
understand: Students will be able to explain the poet's attitude towards love and life in the poem.
Students will be able to analyze the symbolism used in the poem and its significance.
Students will be able to identify the use of imagery and its effect on the reader.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of Imagism to the analysis of the poem.
Students will be able to use the poem as a model to write their own poem on a similar theme.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the theme of the poem with that of another poem on a similar subject.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the poet's use of language to convey the theme of the poem.
Students will be able to identify the poet's perspective on love and life and justify it with evidence from the poem.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of the poet's devices in conveying the theme of the poem.

ncert_objectives: To understand the central theme of the poem and the poet's attitude towards love and life.
To identify and explain the poet's use of devices such as imagery, symbolism, and metaphor.
To analyze the poet's language and its effect on the reader.
board_exam_objectives: To identify the central theme of the poem and explain its significance.
To analyze the poet's use of devices to convey the theme of the poem.
To evaluate the effectiveness of the poet's language in conveying the theme of the poem.
